name: Baked Eggplant, Zucchini and Parmigiano Tortino
recipeIngredient: 1 pound eggplant, peeled and quartered lengthwise
1 large Spanish onion, peeled & cut into 1/4 inch slices
1/2 pound zucchini, sliced into 1/4 inch rounds
1/2 pound yellow squash, sliced into 1/4 inch rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F (160 degrees C).
2. Oil a deep 2 quart (8 cup) baking dish.
3. Heat 1/4 cup olive oil in a large sauté pan and cook onion slices very slowly until tender, but not brown. Remove from pan.
4. Add the other 1/4 cup olive oil to the pan and saute eggplant, zucchini, and squash until tender. Combine with the onion and season with salt, pepper, and oregano.
5. In a food processor, combine all ingredients for the batter (eggs, remaining olive oil, cream, grated parmesan, salt, pepper, and oregano). Place in a large bowl and combine with the cooked vegetables.
6. Pour into the prepared baking dish and cover with foil. Bake for 45 minutes.
7. Remove the foil and top with 2 tablespoons parmesan cheese. Bake for an additional 15 minutes or until set.
